channel.title: StreamWave — Updates
channel.description: Release notes and updates for StreamWave, the free Android streaming app for movies, TV shows, anime and live sports.

item.title: StreamWave v1.2.0 released
item.description: Telegram community integration, Share App feature, profile improvements, and a redesigned loading screen. Download the latest StreamWave APK for Android.

item.title: StreamWave v1.1.0 released
item.description: Added multi-language subtitles, improved player UI, and fixed bugs. Download the latest StreamWave APK for Android.
